things.name: Gardens by the Bay
things.description: Futuristic park with the Supertree Grove, Cloud Forest and Flower Dome biospheres

things.name: Marina Bay Sands
things.description: Iconic three-tower resort with an infinity pool and SkyPark observation deck

things.name: Sentosa Island
things.description: Resort island with Universal Studios, S.E.A. Aquarium and cable car rides

things.name: Chinatown
things.description: Vibrant heritage district with temples, hawker centres and traditional medicine shops

things.name: Little India
things.description: Colourful neighbourhood with Hindu temples, flower garlands and curry houses

things.name: Singapore Botanic Gardens
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage tropical garden with the National Orchid Garden

things.name: Hawker Centre Culture
things.description: UNESCO-listed street food culture at legendary centres like Maxwell and Lau Pa Sat

things.name: National Museum of Singapore
things.description: Singapore's oldest museum in a grand colonial building with living galleries

things.name: Singapore Zoo & Night Safari
things.description: Award-winning open-concept zoo and the world's first nocturnal wildlife park

things.name: Orchard Road
things.description: Singapore's premier shopping street with hundreds of malls and luxury brands
